chapters.title: Prologue
chapters.description: Begin your journey and learn the basics.

nodes.title: Character Creation
nodes.description: Create your character and choose your path.

nodes.title: The Awakening
nodes.description: You awaken in the hub with no memory of how you got here.

nodes.title: First Steps
nodes.description: Learn the basics of movement and interaction.

nodes.title: Combat Training
nodes.description: Face your first opponent in the training arena.

nodes.title: Chapter Complete
nodes.description: You have completed the prologue. The adventure begins!

chapters.title: The Dark Forest
chapters.description: Venture into the mysterious forest surrounding the hub.

nodes.title: Into the Woods
nodes.description: Strange creatures have been spotted in the forest.

nodes.title: Goblin Ambush
nodes.description: You are ambushed by goblin scouts!

nodes.title: The Old Hermit
nodes.description: Meet a mysterious hermit who offers guidance.

nodes.title: Skeleton Crypt
nodes.description: Ancient undead guard a forgotten crypt.

nodes.title: Forest's Heart
nodes.description: Confront the corrupted guardian of the forest.

chapters.title: The Shadow Realm
chapters.description: Enter a dark dimension where reality bends.

nodes.title: Crossing Over
nodes.description: Find the portal to the Shadow Realm.

nodes.title: Shadows Everywhere
nodes.description: Shadow creatures stalk these twisted lands.

nodes.title: The Hidden Truth
nodes.description: Discover the truth behind your arrival in this world.

nodes.title: Escape
nodes.description: Fight your way back to the material plane.
